CustomField.formula: IF(VALUE( Account_Purchasing_Entity__c )=4, "P.O Box 9, Station B", IF(VALUE( Account_Purchasing_Entity__c )=5, "P.O Box 9, Station B", IF(VALUE( Account_Purchasing_Entity__c )=6, "P.O. Box 53, Station B", IF(VALUE( Account_Purchasing_Entity__c )=7, "P.O Box 9, Station B", IF(VALUE( Account_Purchasing_Entity__c )=8, "P.O Box 9, Station B", IF(VALUE( Account_Purchasing_Entity__c )=9, "P.O. Box 53, Station B", IF(VALUE( Account_Purchasing_Entity__c )=10, "P.O. Box 53, Station B", IF(VALUE( Account_Purchasing_Entity__c )=11, "P.O Box 9, Station B", IF(VALUE( Account_Purchasing_Entity__c )=13, "P.O Box 9, Station B", IF(VALUE( Account_Purchasing_Entity__c )=14, "P.O Box 9, Station B", IF(VALUE( Account_Purchasing_Entity__c )=15, "P.O Box 9, Station B", "") ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )))
CustomField.label: Account Purchasing Entity Address
